shokz open swim pro 

OPENSWIM PRO 

Bone Conduction Swimming Headphones

Water to Land, the Music Never Ends

Shop Now 

##  Shokz OpenSwim Pro Best Waterproof Headphones for Swimming with MP3 & Open-Ear & Other Features

Watch the film 

OpenSwim Pro IP68 Waterproof Rating 

OpenSwim Pro IP68 Waterproof Rating 

## IP68 Waterproof Rating

OpenSwim Pro Comfort Beyond Boundaries 

OpenSwim Pro Comfort Beyond Boundaries 

## Secure, Stable Fit

OpenSwim Pro Sports-Optimized Physical Buttons 

OpenSwim Pro Sports-Optimized Physical Buttons 

## Bluetooth + MP3   
Modes

OpenSwim Pro Bluetooth + MP3 

OpenSwim Pro Bluetooth + MP3 

## Stay Aware   
with Open-Ears

OpenSwim Pro Open Ears, Safety First 

OpenSwim Pro Open Ears, Safety First 

## Premium   
Bone Conduct   
Sound Quality

OpenSwim Pro Stability in Motion 

OpenSwim Pro Stability in Motion 

## Up to 9 Hours of Power + Quick Charge

OpenSwim Pro New Feature 

OpenSwim Pro New Feature 

## Waterproof   
Microphone

##  IP68 Waterproof Rating1,  
 Swim-Ready.

 OpenSwim Pro is made for the rhythm of the water—whether you’re gliding through laps or balancing on a paddleboard. Its IP68 rating and triple-sealed build hold steady down to two meters (6.5 feet), giving you confidence in every dive, dip, and stroke.

\*After open-water use, soak in fresh water for about 30 minutes to remove salt.

img1 img1 img1 

##  Stability in Motion.

 No more readjusting with slips and tumbles – OpenSwim Pro is engineered for a secure fit. With flexible, ergonomically shaped ear hooks and a nickel-titanium alloy headband, it stays comfortably in place, whatever water sport you choose.

##  Bluetooth + MP3 Mode.

###  Dual Functionality,  
 Built for Water and Land.

 HOW TO DOWNLOAD SONGS 

 OpenSwim Pro switches seamlessly between Bluetooth® V5.4 for use on land and the built-in MP3 Mode\* for playback underwater. Move between modes effortlessly using the button or the Shokz App.  
 MP3 Mode offers 32GB2 for more than 8,000 songs3 in multiple formats\* with fast transfer speeds. You can easily organize your tracks and build custom playlists for every session.

 \*Underwater use is limited to MP3 Mode due to Bluetooth signal disruption by water. Supports MP3, FLAC, WAV, AAC, M4A, APE, WMA.

 HOW TO DOWNLOAD SONGS 

img1 img1 

##  Open-Ear Design.4 

###  Stay Aware Above.   
 Stay Immersed Below.

 Our signature open-ear design keeps you aware of your surroundings above water, giving you confidence during watersports. Underwater, it pairs perfectly with professional swimming earplugs to keep water and debris out while maintaining clear, stable audio, especially in the open water.

img1 

Step 1 

Step 2 

Step 3 

Step 4 

## HOW TO DOWNLOAD SONGS

Step 1: Find your downloaded songs on your computer and check their file location.

Step 2: Make sure each file is in a supported format. \*If not, convert the file before importing.

Step 3: Connect OpenSwim Pro to your computer using the magnetic charging cable.

Step 4: Open the disk drive named SWIM PRO.

Step 5: Drag and drop your audio files into the drive.

Step 6: Once the transfer is complete, safely eject the SWIM PRO drive from your computer.

\*Supported formats: MP3, FLAC, WAV, AAC, M4A, APE, WMA.

##  Vivid Sound,   
 Even Underwater.

 Enjoy clear sound, powerful volume, and rich bass with PremiumPitch™ 2.0+ Bone Conduction Technology. Designed exclusively for swimming, the swimming EQ Mode brings a more immersive underwater experience, with even better clarity when used with earplugs\*.

\*Earplugs are included in the package.

OpenSwimPro Battery 

##  Battery That  
 Keeps Going.5 

Battery life in Bluetooth mode:

9 hours

Battery life in MP3 mode:

6 hours

A quick 10-minute charge

gives you 3 hours of listening time.

##  Waterproof Mic.   
 Clear Calls. Anywhere.

 OpenSwim Pro’s IP68 waterproof design shields the microphone in wet conditions, ensuring clear voice quality during training and daily use. A breathable membrane keeps vocals natural, while ENC(Environmental Noise Cancellation) and DNS(Digital Noise Suppression) reduce background noise for crisp, reliable calls.

## Designed for the Water.

###  Sports-Optimized   
 Physical Buttons.

 Physical buttons deliver crisp, tactile feedback with a clear rebound on every press. Use simple key combinations to effortlessly control songs, playlists, and other functions.

### Seamless Integration.

 Flexible, slim ear hooks ensure a secure, comfortable fit with swim caps, goggles, and gear, seamlessly staying in place with every swim.

 HOW TO WEAR THE HEADPHONES 

How to Wear 

## HOW TO WEAR THE HEADPHONES

Headphones on first, then pull the cap over the ear hooks and the top of your ears.

## MultiPoint Pairing.

 Pair OpenSwim Pro with two Bluetooth devices simultaneously, including smartwatches, smartphones, tablets, and more. Switch effortlessly via the Shokz App or button controls for versatile listening.

## Customize Your Experience with the Shokz App.

 Download version 5.6.0 or later of the Shokz App to unlock even more ways to customize your OpenSwim Pro. Choose your playback order, switch between playlists with ease, and enjoy optimized audio with the dedicated Swimming EQ mode underwater. You’ll also get seamless control of Bluetooth® V5.4 and MP3 Mode switching, MultiPoint Pairing, EQ settings, real-time battery information, and firmware updates.

 HOW TO SWITCH PLAYLISTS 

## HOW TO SWITCH PLAYLISTS

Via Shokz App 

### Via the Shokz App (MP3 Mode)

Step 1: Update the Shokz App to version 5.6.0 or later (Settings > Upgrade Firmware).

Step 2: Go to MP3 Mode > Local Audio and select your playlist.

Via Button Controls 

### Via Button Controls (MP3 Mode)

Step 1: Update the Shokz App to version 5.6.0 or later (Settings > Upgrade Firmware).

Step 2: Press and hold Volume + and Volume – for 2 seconds to switch from Bluetooth to MP3 Mode.

Step 3: Press and hold the Multifunction and Volume – buttons for 2 seconds to switch playlists.

Shokz アプリ

 1\. OpenSwim Pro can be submerged in up to 2 meters of fresh water. OpenSwim Pro was tested under controlled laboratory conditions and has a rating of IP68 under IEC standard 60529\. The water-proof properties of this product are not permanent and may decrease over time due to normal wear and tear.

2\. Usable storage varies due to system files, and for data management functions.

 3\. Calculated based on regular-quality songs at 4MB each. High-quality songs are approximately 8MB, storing about 4,000 high-quality music tracks.

 4\. For your safety, ensure your OpenSwim Pro is fitted securely and control the volume to maintain full situational awareness. Always remain alert to your surroundings to prevent accidents, whether you are swimming, cycling, or driving. We strongly recommend wearing high-visibility gear in open water. Always use this product in strict compliance with all applicable local and maritime laws. 

 5\. Endurance test conditions: This data was gathered at the Shokz Lab in a temperature-controlled environment of 25±2 °C, playing AAC-encoded audio at a 75% volume and all other features set to default. The actual battery life depends on the volume, sound source, degree of environmental interference, product features, use habits, and other factors.

 Follow Us

 Stay ahead with our latest news, share your Shokz stories, and tag #ShokzSquad for a chance to be featured

<user_query>
https://shokz.com/pages/openswimpro  有没有问题
</user_query>

我来检查一下这个页面的信息，先对照一下我们知识库和产品资料。

The user is asking me to check the OpenSwim Pro product page on shokz.com for any issues. They've provided a screenshot of the page and the web content has been fetched. Let me also check the knowledge base to compare the information on the website against our standardized knowledge base data.

Let me analyze the image and the web content for any issues.

From the image, I can see the OpenSwim Pro product page showing these specs:
1. 8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+)
2. Bluetooth Mode: 9 Hours, MP3 Mode: 6 Hours


3. A 10-Min Charge for 3 Hours of Use
4. Magnetic Induction
5. IP68
6. Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones
7. 27.3g
8. 1.5 Hours
9. 2 years

Now I'm checking the knowledge base to see what OpenSwim Pro specifications we have on file and comparing them against what's displayed on the website.

让我再查一下知识库中关于骨传导技术代数和麦克风描述的信息。

Now let me analyze the image provided by the user and compare it with the official spec sheet and meet sheet data.

From the image (which appears to be from the shokz.com/pages/openswimpro page), I can see these spec icons:

1. 8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+)
2. Bluetooth Mode: 9 Hours, MP3 Mode: 6 Hours
3. A 10-Min Charge for 3 Hours of Use
4. Magnetic Induction
5. IP68
6. **Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones** ← This is interesting


7. Weight of 27.3g
8. 1.5 hours charge time
9. 2-year warranty

Now I'm cross-referencing these against the spec sheet and meet sheet data to verify accuracy.

Looking at the microphone specifications, there's a discrepancy—the web content lists "Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones" but the meet sheet describes the microphone features as ENC and DNS technology without mentioning the "Dual AI" branding, so I need to determine which description is accurate.

I'm also noticing the "8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech" claim needs verification since the spec sheet mentions PremiumPitch™ 2.0+ but doesn't specify a generation number, and I should check whether this generation designation is correct for the OpenSwim Pro.

The charge time of 1.5 hours matches the 90-minute spec, so that checks out. But I'm seeing a potential mismatch with the "Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones" phrasing—the actual specs describe ENC and DNS technology with waterproof microphone capabilities, which might be labeled differently in the product materials. Checking if there's any mention of "8th generation" bone conduction technology in the available information to verify that claim for the OpenSwim Pro.

根据我对照了官方 Spec Sheet、Meet Sheet 以及知识库数据，我发现了以下问题：

---

## 页面审查结果

### 有问题的地方

**1. "Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones" — 错误，不属于这个产品**

这是页面截图图标区最明显的错误。对照 OpenSwim Pro 自己的 Meet Sheet 和 Spec Sheet：

- Meet Sheet 的麦克风描述是：**"Waterproof Mic. Clear Calls. Anywhere."**，技术是 **ENC (Environmental Noise Cancellation) + DNS (Digital Noise Suppression)**
- 同一页面的正文（body text）也写的是 "Waterproof Microphone" + ENC + DNS

而 **"Dual AI noise-canceling & wind-resistant mics"** 是 **OpenRun Pro 2** 的卖点，被错放到了 OpenSwim Pro 的图标区。

**这属于产品卖点张冠李戴的严重错误。**

---

**2. "8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech" — 存在风格不一致**

- OpenSwim Pro 的 Spec Sheet 和 Meet Sheet 中都只写了 **"PremiumPitch™ 2.0+ Bone Conduction Technology"**，从未标注 "8th Generation"
- 页面正文也只写了 "PremiumPitch™ 2.0+"
- 但图标区写的是 "8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+)"

虽然 PremiumPitch™ 2.0+ 本身确实对应第8代技术（OpenRun、OpenMove 等产品资料里有写"8th Generation"），但 **OpenSwim Pro 的官方资料中从未使用过 "8th gen" 这个说法**。图标和正文之间存在不一致。

---

### 正确无误的地方

| 图标信息 | Spec Sheet 数据 | 结果 |
|---------|---------------|------|
| Bluetooth Mode: 9 Hours / MP3 Mode: 6 Hours | Bluetooth Mode: 9 Hours / MP3 Mode: 6 Hours | ✅ |
| A 10-Min Charge for 3 Hours of Use | A 10-Minute Charge Gives 3 Hours of Battery Life | ✅ |
| Magnetic Induction（磁吸充电） | Magnetic Charging Cable | ✅ |
| IP68 | IP68 | ✅ |
| 27.3g | 27.3 g | ✅ |
| 1.5 Hours（充电时间） | 90 Minutes | ✅ (90分钟=1.5小时) |
| 2 years（质保） | 2 Years | ✅ |

---

### 总结

| 严重程度 | 问题 | 建议 |
|---------|------|------|
| **严重** | 图标区 "Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones" 是 OpenRun Pro 2 的卖点，不是 OpenSwim Pro 的 | 应改为 **"Waterproof Microphone"** 或 **"Waterproof Microphones with ENC & DNS"** |
| **中等** | 图标区写了 "8th-Gen"，但 OpenSwim Pro 官方资料和页面正文均未使用这一说法 | 建议与产品团队确认是否保留 "8th-Gen" 标注，或统一为 "PremiumPitch™ 2.0+" |

建议将此问题反馈给网站内容团队，优先修正麦克风描述的错误。

Now I have a comprehensive picture. Let me analyze the issues I found on the OpenSwim Pro product page by comparing the image (icon spec area) and the web page content against the official Spec Sheet and Meet Sheet.

From the image, the spec icons show:
1. 8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+)
2. Bluetooth Mode: 9 Hours, MP3 Mode: 6 Hours
3. A 10-Min Charge for 3 Hours of Use
4. Magnetic Induction
5. IP68
6. **Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones**


7. 27.3g
8. 1.5 Hours (charge time)
9. 2 years (warranty)

The first major discrepancy is with the microphone specification. The official documentation describes "ENC (Environmental Noise Cancellation) and DNS (Digital Noise Suppression)" under "Waterproof Mic," but the product page claims "Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones," which doesn't appear in either the Meet Sheet or Spec Sheet.  Looking at the knowledge base, "Dual AI noise-canceling & wind-resistant mics" is actually a feature of the OpenRun Pro 2, while "Dual noise-canceling microphone" applies to the OpenRun Pro and other OpenRun variants. The OpenSwim Pro's microphone advantage should focus on being waterproof with ENC and DNS capabilities—this is a significant error where features from other products got mixed into the OpenSwim Pro description.

For the bone conduction technology claim, I'm checking which products actually use the 8th generation version according to the knowledge base, since this specification needs verification against the actual product lineup. 我注意到网页正文中没有提到"8th gen"，但图标区域明确标注了"8th-Gen Bone Conduction Tech (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+)"。由于PremiumPitch 2.0+确实是第8代技术，这个差异可能只是表述方式的不同，我把它标记为轻微的不一致。现在看颜色选项，图片中只显示了两个颜色（红色和灰/黑色），但规格表列出了灰色、红色和白色三种颜色，网页应该展示全部三种。

不过我在其他地方看到了"OpenSwim Pro - White"的提及，所以这可能只是图片选择性展示的问题。

关于防水麦克风部分，网页正文提到"ENC和DNS降低背景噪音"，但图标区域说的是"双AI降噪麦克风"，这两个说法在同一页面上存在明显矛盾。充电时间方面，规格表的90分钟和图标显示的1.5小时是一致的。

现在我看清楚了关键问题：规格图标区域的"双AI降噪麦克风"标签与OpenSwim Pro的官方规格文档和同一网页的正文内容都不符，这才是真正需要指出的主要问题。

<user_query>
https://shokz.com/pages/product-comparison 对比这个呢
</user_query>

这个对比页面内容量很大，我已经完整分析了所有参数对比区域。以下是我的发现：

---

## 对比页审查结果

### 确认的问题

**1. OpenSwim Pro 麦克风描述 — 与产品页同一个错误**

对比页 Microphone Type 一栏中，OpenSwim Pro 标注为：
> **Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones**

这与产品页一样是错误的。OpenSwim Pro 的 Meet Sheet 明确写的是 **Waterproof Mic** + **ENC + DNS** 技术，而非 "AI Noise-Canceling"。"AI" 降噪是 OpenRun Pro 2、OpenFit Pro、OpenFit 2/2+、OpenDots ONE 等新品的专属标签。

**这说明产品页和对比页的错误是同源的，可能来自同一个数据表。**

---

**2. 图片 alt 文本拼写错误 — "Bone Condcution"**

在页面中多次出现：
> "Shokz Headphones OpenRun Pro 2 Best **Bone Condcution** Headphones for Sports"

**"Condcution"** 应该是 **"Conduction"**。这个拼写错误至少出现了 **十几次**（每个响应式布局副本重复一次）。虽然用户看不到 alt 文本，但它影响 **SEO** 和 **无障碍访问**。

---

### 需要确认的差异（骨传导技术代数）

对比页的代数标注与部分产品 Meet Sheet 不一致：

| 产品 | 对比页标注 | Meet Sheet 标注 | 状态 |
|------|-----------|---------------|------|
| OpenRun | 8th-Gen (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+) | 8th gen | 一致 |
| OpenRun Pro | **9th-Gen (TurboPitch™)** | **"The 8th generation"** | 不一致 |
| OpenMove | **7th-Gen (PremiumPitch™ 2.0)** | **"8th Generation"** | 不一致 |
| OpenComm2 UC | 7th-Gen (PremiumPitch™ 2.0) | "7th-generation" | 一致 |
| OpenSwim Pro | 8th-Gen (PremiumPitch™ 2.0+) | 未标注代数 | — |

可能的解释：对比页可能采用了最新的统一代数编号体系（PremiumPitch 2.0 = 7代，2.0+ = 8代，TurboPitch = 9代，DualPitch = 10代），而部分旧版 Meet Sheet 还沿用了早期的标注。**建议与产品团队确认哪个编号是最新标准。**

---

### 核实无误的参数

我重点核对了 OpenSwim Pro 在对比表中的所有参数：

| 参数 | 对比页 | Spec Sheet | 结果 |
|------|--------|-----------|------|
| 续航 | BT 9h / MP3 6h | BT 9h / MP3 6h | 正确 |
| 快充 | 10-Min = 3 Hours | 10min = 3h | 正确 |
| 充电方式 | Magnetic Induction | Magnetic Charging Cable | 正确 |
| 防水等级 | IP68 Swimproof (2m) | IP68 | 正确 |
| 蓝牙版本 | V5.4 + 32GB MP3 | V5.4 | 正确 |
| 重量 | 27.3 g | 27.3 g | 正确 |
| 材质 | Silicone, Plastic, NiTi Alloy | 同上 | 正确 |
| 充电时间 | 1.5 Hours | 90 Minutes | 正确 |
| 电池容量 | 160 mAh | 160 mAh (Min) | 正确 |
| 编码格式 | AAC, SBC / MP3, FLAC等 | AAC, SBC / MP3, FLAC等 | 正确 |
| 频率响应 | 20 Hz - 20 kHz | 20 Hz - 20 KHz | 正确 |
| 麦克风灵敏度 | -38 dB ± 1 dB | -38 dB ± 1 dB | 正确 |
| 扬声器灵敏度 | 105 dB ± 3 dB | 105 dB ± 3 dB | 正确 |

---

### 总结

| 严重程度 | 问题 | 影响范围 |
|---------|------|---------|
| **严重** | OpenSwim Pro 麦克风标注 "Dual AI Noise-Canceling Microphones" 错误 | 产品页 + 对比页（同源错误） |
